diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Manufacturing/Routing/CalculateRoutingLine.Codeunit.al

           (1 + ProdOrderRoutingLine."Scrap Factor % (Accumulated)") *
           (1 + TotalScrap / 100) +
           ProdOrderRoutingLine."Fixed Scrap Qty. (Accum.)";
@@ -1318,14 +1318,7 @@ codeunit 99000774 "Calculate Routing Line"

-            TotalQtyPerOperation :=

-              (1 + ProdOrderRoutingLine."Scrap Factor % (Accumulated)") *

-              ProdOrderRoutingLine."Fixed Scrap Qty. (Accum.)"
-        else

+        TotalQtyPerOperation := MaxLotSize;
 
         OnBeforeCalcExpectedCost(ProdOrderRoutingLine, MaxLotSize, TotalQtyPerOperation, ActualOperOutput, ExpectedOperOutput, TotalScrap);

     begin

-            "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType()
-        else
+        if "Source Type" in ["Source Type"::"Customer Disc. Group", "Source Type"::"Customer Price Group"] then begin
+            CopyTo(PriceSource);
+            "Amount Type" := PriceSource.GetDefaultAmountType();
+        end else
             "Amount Type" := CalcAmountType();
         if "Amount Type" <> xAmountType then
             Modify()

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/SendReminder.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/SendReminder.Codeunit.al
index 94cce9d1..ca618254 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/SendReminder.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Reminder/SendReminder.Codeunit.al
@@ -12,6 +12,20 @@ codeunit 545 "Send Reminder"
     Permissions = tabledata "Issued Reminder Header" = rmid,
                   tabledata "Email Outbox" = rmid;
 
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Report Selections", 'OnAfterIsCustomerAccount', '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnAfterIsCustomerAccount(DocumentTableId: Integer; var IsCustomer: Boolean);
+    begin
+        if DocumentTableId = Database::"Issued Reminder Header" then
+            IsCustomer := true;
+    end;
+
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Table, Database::"Report Selections", 'OnSendEmailDirectlyOnAfterSetFieldName', '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnSendEmailDirectlyOnAfterSetFieldName(DocumentTableId: Integer; var FieldName: Text);
+    begin
+        if DocumentTableId = Database::"Issued Reminder Header" then
+            FieldName := 'Customer No.';
+    end;
+
     [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Document-Mailing", 'OnAfterEmailSent', '', false, false)]
     local procedure HandleEmailSent(var TempEmailItem: Record "Email Item" temporary; PostedDocNo: Code[20]; ReportUsage: Integer; EmailSentSuccesfully: Boolean)
     var

diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Planning/JobCreateInvoice.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Planning/JobCreateInvoice.Codeunit.al
index 1e465e16..efc2fe08 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Planning/JobCreateInvoice.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Projects/Project/Planning/JobCreateInvoice.Codeunit.al
@@ -384,6 +384,8 @@ codeunit 1002 "Job Create-Invoice"
 
     local procedure CreateNewInvoice(var JobTask: Record "Job Task"; InvoicePerTask: Boolean; var OldJobNo: Code[20]; var OldJobTaskNo: Code[20]; LastJobTask: Boolean): Boolean
     var
+        Job: Record Job;
+        BufferedJobTask: Record "Job Task";
         NewInvoice: Boolean;
         IsHandled: Boolean;
     begin
@@ -396,9 +398,24 @@ codeunit 1002 "Job Create-Invoice"
             NewInvoice := true
         else begin
             if OldJobNo <> '' then begin
-                if InvoicePerTask then
-                    if (OldJobNo <> JobTask."Job No.") or (OldJobTaskNo <> JobTask."Job Task No.") then
-                        NewInvoice := true;
+                if InvoicePerTask then begin
+                    if OldJobNo <> JobTask."Job No." then
+                        NewInvoice := true
+                    else begin
+                        Job.Get(JobTask."Job No.");
+                        if Job."Task Billing Method" = Job."Task Billing Method"::"Multiple customers" then begin
+                            if TempJobPlanningLine.FindFirst() then
+                                if BufferedJobTask.Get(TempJobPlanningLine."Job No.", TempJobPlanningLine."Job Task No.") then
+                                    if (BufferedJobTask."Sell-to Customer No." <> JobTask."Sell-to Customer No.") or
+                                       (BufferedJobTask."Bill-to Customer No." <> JobTask."Bill-to Customer No.") or
+                                       (BufferedJobTask."Invoice Currency Code" <> JobTask."Invoice Currency Code")
+                                    then
+                                        NewInvoice := true;
+                        end else
+                            if OldJobTaskNo <> JobTask."Job Task No." then
+                                NewInvoice := true;
+                    end;
+                end;
                 if not InvoicePerTask then
                     if OldJobNo <> JobTask."Job No." then
                         NewInvoice := true;

         OnAfterGetTotalAmountLCYCommon(Rec, TotalAmountLCY);

         if ItemJournalLine.FindSet() then begin
